RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_KAHO.banter.alive.end: Hurry, hurry! Let's bloom next turn too!
RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_KAHO.cardsModifierDes: __ cards full of 'possibilities' will bloom in rewards and shops!
RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_KAHO.description:
Aiming to become a school idol who brings smiles to everyone!
Even in the Spire, I will bloom together with everyone!
RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_KAHO.eventDeathPreven: I haven't bloomed with everyone yet... I can't stop here!
RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_KAHO.goldMonologue: Wow! So much gold?! I can use this to buy delicious snacks for Kozue-senpai... Ah, no, to buy powerful equipment!
RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_KAHO.title: Hinoshita Kaho
